chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1520 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.6881/2019 2. For hearing of main case 13.01.2025 Mr. Sundar Lal, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, advocate for respondent Mr. Altaf Ahmed Sahar, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel has impugned notice dated 25.02.2019 and states that the matter is already covered by the judgment of this Court. He further states that he shall respond to the notice, however, seeks that pending adjudication of the notice no coercive action may be taken thereagainst. Learned counsel for respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Judge Judge Amjad
